summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TutorIA MVP - AI tutor app for primary school students. Most core functionality working correctly with one critical backend issue identified.

critical_bugs.issue: ObjectId serialization error causing 500 Internal Server Error
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks exercise generation and practice mode functionality
critical_bugs.error_details: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]

integration_issues.issue: Exercise loading fails due to backend ObjectId error

working_features: Landing page with proper auth redirect

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all elements
API root endpoint returns correct response
API skills endpoint returns skills list
Child dashboard UI and check-in flow
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix ObjectId serialization issue in /api/exercises/generate endpoint. The error occurs when trying to serialize MongoDB ObjectId fields in exercise documents. Need to either exclude _id fields or convert ObjectIds to strings before returning responses.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all UI working, 1 integration issue due to backend)
